name: PolygonNode
summary: The PolygonNode class represents flat geometry tree node.

constructors.name: PolygonNode
constructors.signature: public PolygonNode(Contour contour, bool isAutomaticNode = false)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PolygonNode class.

params.name: contour
params.doc: The contour points of the node.

params.name: isAutomaticNode
params.doc: true if the node represents an automatically generated extension.

methods.name: AcceptVisitor
methods.summary: Entry method for the visitor pattern

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

returns.doc: A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

properties.name: Contour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the contour points of flat geometry.

properties.name: IsAutomatic
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this geometry node was automatically generated (returns false if it was originally a user-defined part)
